scripts.clean: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$repo=(Resolve-Path .).Path; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'node.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -like ('*' + $repo + '*next*') } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; if (Test-Path .next) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next }"
scripts.clean:force: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$repo=(Resolve-Path .).Path; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'node.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -like ('*' + $repo + '*next*') } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; if (Test-Path .next) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next }"
